title: Monetary Penalty on Navapur Mercantile Co-operative Bank Ltd.
source_url: Not directly available in search results
description: RBI imposed a monetary penalty of ₹10,000 on Navapur Mercantile Co-operative Bank Ltd. for violation of Section 35(2) read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, specifically for failure to provide required information during statutory inspection as of March 31, 2025.
